data.title: Scalable Microservices
data.description: Instagram operates on a cloud-based microservice architecture to ensure scalability and reliability.

data.title: Image and Video Processing
data.description: Efficient handling of user-generated videos and images through specialized processing pipelines.
data.technical_spec: FFmpeg, PyTorch for machine learning-driven enhancements.

data.title: Real-time Messaging Infrastructure
data.description: Supports real-time interactions via chat and notifications.
data.technical_spec: WebSocket protocol, MQ such as Kafka for message queuing.

data.title: Data Analytics and Machine Learning
data.description: Leverages big data analytics for better user experience and content recommendations.
data.technical_spec: Apache Hadoop for data processing, TensorFlow for ML models.

data.title: Content Delivery Network
data.description: Uses CDN for fast and reliable delivery of multimedia content worldwide.
data.technical_spec: Akamai CDN, Cloudflare for content delivery and load balancing.
